themes: Claude Code tooling ecosystem (MCP, memory, multiplexers)
AI PM role & builder skills bar

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: Google committing $10B now (and up to $40B conditional) to Anthropic at a $350B valuation is the biggest compute/capital story in weeks and directly shapes Claude's competitive ceiling.

worthClicking.author: @RoundtableSpace
worthClicking.why: Dario saying Claude is 6-12 months from doing most or all of what Anthropic's own team does end-to-end is an unusually concrete AGI-adjacent claim worth tracking for product strategy.

worthClicking.author: @signulll
worthClicking.why: 4K+ likes on the argument that the computer needs to be reinvented from scratch—not patched with chatbot sidebars—is gaining real traction as a product framing thesis.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Sharp diagnosis of the PM identity trap: 'you are not a developer' orthodoxy created a verification gap where PMs can't confirm what got built matches what they specified.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Concrete cost compression data: PM mockup cost dropped from $1,500–6,000 to $2–7—useful framing for product and sales conversations about AI ROI.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Jevons paradox applied to AI labor demand—cheaper intelligence increases total consumption—directly relevant to the 'AI kills jobs vs. creates demand' debate operators are navigating.

worthClicking.author: @DataChaz
worthClicking.why: Tolaria—a Mac app built on Karpathy's LLM wiki concept—gives agents and humans a shared native knowledge environment, potentially useful for Claude Code memory architecture.

worthClicking.author: @minchoi
worthClicking.why: Concrete multi-model workflow (Grok for search, Opus for reasoning, GPT-5.5+Codex for coding, cross-debug) is a practical benchmark for how serious builders are allocating across models right now.

voices.why: Running a sustained thread on PM skill evolution, Jevons paradox, and AI cost compression—directly relevant to AI product strategy even when his feed is diluted by off-topic content.
Low-volume, high-signal takes on computing reinvention and distribution—the computer-from-scratch post is the kind of product framing thesis worth watching develop.
Curating practical Claude Code tooling (MCP servers, multiplexers, agent frameworks) at a level of specificity useful to builders, not just watchers.

examples: personal travel/feelings posts with no signal content

fading.theme: Cursor -23% gross margin & model dependency risk
